Eclipse Agave RPC custom method registration (chainovi/eclipse-agave #12):

TRAIT: Two modules via jsonrpc_derive::rpc: rpc_minimal (line 2714) + rpc_full (line 3395).

METHOD MACRO: #[rpc(meta, name="X")] fn method(&self, meta: Metadata, param: Type, config: RpcContextConfig) -> Result<Response>;

EXAMPLE - getFeeForMessage (lines 3617-3623 trait, 4237-4261 impl):
- Decodes base64, calls bank.get_fee_for_message(&sanitized_msg), wraps in new_response()

METADATA: JsonRpcRequestProcessor (lines 236-260)
- meta.get_bank_with_config(config) -> Arc<Bank>
- meta.bank(commitment), blockstore, cluster_info, health, bigtable_ledger_storage

RESPONSE: new_response() (lines 143-148) takes (&Bank, T) -> RpcResponse<T> with bank.slot()

1. solana_test_validator_trv1_genesis crate (5x) -> string literals: TREASURY_PROGRAM_ID, GOVERNANCE_PROGRAM_ID, DEVELOPER_REWARDS_PROGRAM_ID
2. trv1_active_set() (3x) -> trv1_active_validator_set() (Bank public method, line 2153)
3. executed_programs() -> trv1_executed_programs() (Bank public method, line 2176)
4. bank_or_err() fixed: meta.bank(None).map_err() -> Ok(meta.get_bank())
5. Added pub fn get_bank(&self) -> Arc<Bank> to JsonRpcRequestProcessor (after genesis_creation_time)
6. Type annotation errors (line 777) resolved when executed_programs fixed

Result: cargo check --features agave-unstable-api -p solana-rpc -> 0 errors, 1 warning

FILE: /home/crab/.claude/architecture.html — 1,239 lines

Trading framework Claude integration: Layers A (dev tool) + B (analysis) + C (decisions).

ARCH: A active (torus), B->C analysis, C decisions gated like coded strategies.
ClaudeStrategy: Gets analysis from B + portfolio, asks BUY/SELL/HOLD size/stop-loss/take-profit, parsed to Signal.

MODEL TIERING: Haiku $0.001 (screening every candle), Sonnet $0.01 (decide when flagged), Opus $0.10 (weekly deep analysis)

RISKS: Hallucinated->validate, aggressive->position gates, API down->fail-closed, expensive->tiering, non-testable->historical, non-deterministic->5x test

PHASES: 1-2 coded, 3 add B, 4 add C paper, 5 real after proof

/home/crab/.claude/hooks/shared/test_generator.py: Auto-generate test stubs.

DESIGN: AST scanner (no imports, safe for sys.exit), top-level only, 3 types: gate_check, shared_util, skill_entry
- gate_check: check(tool_name, tool_input, state) -> GateResult
- shared_util: _state setup only if state arg present
- ABSOLUTE _HOOKS_DIR path (not __file__), runs from /tmp/
- _stub_args() valid literals, no inline comments
- __main__ smoke test: shared/gate_router.py

API: scan_module(path), generate_tests(scan_result, module_path), generate_smoke_test(path)
CLI: python3 shared/test_generator.py [module] [--output file]

OptimisticChain final security fix (Session 3, 2026-02-10):

TEAMS: oc-final-fixes (4 agents) fixed all 15 security findings:
- snapshot-impl: H-3 vote weight snapshots (ERC20Votes checkpoints, binary search getVoteWeightAt, snapshotBlock per proposal)
- fee-hardener: M-2 _lerp() clamping [0,10000], M-3 restoreLinearTransition(), M-6 dApp fee solvency
- passive-optimizer: M-4 O(1) _voteWeights counter (replace unbounded loop)
- low-info-sweep: L-1 zero-address, L-2 events on setters, L-3 getValidatorList, L-5 bounds, I-1 named constants, I-3 errors, I-4 getters

RESULT: 22/22 security findings fixed, 241 tests (0 failures, 14 suites)

LEARNING: 4 agents on same codebase cause transient test failures during concurrent edits — resolves once all finish. Validate only own suite during work.

Created /home/crab/.claude/hooks/shared/hook_profiler.py: Nanosecond-precision gate profiler.

PUBLIC API:
- profile(gate_name, check_fn) -> wrapped_fn: decorator, appends JSONL to /tmp/gate_latency.jsonl per call
- analyze(gate_filter=None) -> dict: {gate: {count, p50_ns, p95_ns, p99_ns, min_ns, max_ns, avg_ns, blocked_count}}
- report(gate_filter=None) -> str: ASCII table sorted by p95 desc, microseconds
- decorate_enforcer(enforcer_module) -> int: monkey-patches _loaded_gates, idempotent, returns count

IMPL: time.perf_counter_ns(), JSONL {gate, tool, elapsed_ns, blocked, ts}, nearest-rank percentile, non-fatal I/O
WRAPPER: Sets _profiler_wrapped=True + _original_check=fn
DISTINCT FROM: shared/gate_timing.py (writes .gate_timings.json in ms)

TESTED: 8 assertions pass (import, wrap, JSONL shape, analyze, gate_filter, report, empty-log, idempotent decorate)

State-Based Warnings for UserPromptSubmit Hook (planned):

CURRENT: Static reminders every prompt (Rule 5, Rule 8). Upgrade = context-aware, read framework state, warn only when relevant:

1. Unsaved fixes: If edits but not committed, warn "You have uncommitted changes"
2. Unqueried memory: If new task topic but memory not searched, warn "Memory not queried for this topic"
3. Open causal chains: If record_attempt() without matching record_outcome(), warn "Open causal chain — don't forget to close it"

READS: .capture_queue.jsonl, git status, .memory_last_queried, etc. Emit targeted warnings only when actionable (reduces noise).
